remarks: ***All offers will be reviewed Monday 6/22 at 4:30.*** Enjoy the perfect blend of space, privacy, and convenience in this detached townhouse ideally located in downtown Stamford. Offering approximately 2,000 square feet of living space and the feel of a single-family home with the ease of low-maintenance living, this home is just moments from Stamford's dining, shopping, entertainment, parks, and transportation options. The main level features hardwood floors throughout, an updated kitchen with stone countertops, stainless steel appliances, and new luxury vinyl plank flooring, plus an open layout ideal for everyday living and entertaining. The spacious living room offers a fireplace and access to a private balcony, while the dining area opens to a secluded deck with new composite decking. Upstairs, the generous primary suite includes a custom walk-in closet, second large closet, and en-suite bath. Two additional bedrooms, a full bath, and a spacious laundry area complete the upper level. The lower level offers a finished flex space ideal for a home office, gym, den, or media room, along with an oversized two-car garage and excellent storage. Recent improvements include a newer roof, HVAC system, washer, dryer, dishwasher, refrigerator, and wine fridge. With a low HOA of just $150 per month and multiple grassy common areas to enjoy, this move-in-ready home offers exceptional value in one of Stamford's most sought-after locations.
